nodes.name: WsGateFriendClient.java
nodes.summary: Client-facing interface for sending add-friend and respond-friend commands to channel-engine.

nodes.name: WsGateFriendClient
nodes.summary: Abstraction implemented by WsGateFriendClientGrpc, used by WsGateFriendHandler to invoke Friend domain operations without gRPC coupling.

nodes.name: WebSocketConfig.java
nodes.summary: Spring WebSocket configuration registering the WsGateDispatcher at the "/ws" endpoint with a handshake interceptor and permissive CORS origin pattern.

nodes.name: WebSocketConfig
nodes.summary: Spring @Configuration class implementing WebSocketConfigurer to wire up the gateway's single WebSocket endpoint.

nodes.name: registerWebSocketHandlers
nodes.summary: Registers WsGateDispatcher as the handler for the "/ws" endpoint with an HttpSessionHandshakeInterceptor and wildcard allowed origin patterns.

nodes.name: WsGateDispatcher.java
nodes.summary: Central WebSocket message dispatcher that deserializes incoming JSON payloads by wsType and routes them to the appropriate domain handler (connection, friend, room, chat), managing connect/disconnect lifecycle.

nodes.name: WsGateDispatcher
nodes.summary: TextWebSocketHandler implementation acting as the single entry point for all WebSocket traffic in the gateway, fanning out to per-domain handlers.

nodes.name: handleTextMessage
nodes.summary: Parses an incoming WebSocketDTO and switches on wsType to dispatch to WsGateConnectionHandler, WsGateFriendHandler, WsGateRoomHandler, or WsGateChatHandler, responding with a failure event for unknown types or parse errors.

nodes.name: afterConnectionClosed
nodes.summary: Cleans up session state on disconnect by removing the connected user and their room memberships from WsGateSessionRegistry and releasing any outbound send lock.

nodes.name: PayloadAddFriendRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: Inbound WebSocket payload DTO carrying the target user's public id for an add-friend request.

nodes.name: PayloadRespondFriendRequestDTO.java
nodes.summary: Inbound WebSocket payload DTO carrying the requester's public id and the accept/reject action for a friend response.

nodes.name: WsGateAuthException.java
nodes.summary: Runtime exception thrown when a WebSocket operation requires an authenticated session but none is present.

nodes.name: WsGateChEngineFriendClientGrpc.java
nodes.summary: gRPC client implementation of WsGateChEngineFriendClient, calling channel-engine's findOnlineFriendTargets RPC and converting the gRPC response to a DTO.

nodes.name: WsGateChEngineFriendClientGrpc
nodes.summary: gRPC-backed implementation of the WsGateChEngineFriendClient interface used to detect which friends are online.

nodes.name: findOnlineFriendTargets
nodes.summary: Builds a FindOnlineFriendTargetsRequest gRPC message, invokes the channel-engine friend gRPC stub, converts the response via GrpcToDtoConverter, and logs the result.

nodes.name: WsGateFriendClientGrpc.java
nodes.summary: gRPC client implementation of WsGateFriendClient, forwarding addFriend/respondFriend commands to channel-engine over gRPC and converting the responses to DTOs.

nodes.name: WsGateFriendClientGrpc
nodes.summary: gRPC-backed implementation of WsGateFriendClient bridging the WebSocket gateway to the channel-engine Friend service.

nodes.name: addFriend
nodes.summary: Builds an AddFriendRequest gRPC message from the command, invokes the channel-engine friend gRPC stub, and converts the response into a FriendEventResponseDTO.

nodes.name: respondFriend
nodes.summary: Builds a RespondFriendRequest gRPC message from the command, invokes the channel-engine friend gRPC stub, and converts the response into a FriendEventResponseDTO.

nodes.name: WsGateConnectionHandler.java
nodes.summary: Handles WebSocket connect/disconnect lifecycle events: authenticates the session, registers it in WsGateSessionRegistry, and pushes an online notification to the user's accepted friends.

nodes.name: WsGateConnectionHandler
nodes.summary: Manages the lifecycle of a user's WebSocket connection, including registration, forced disconnects, and presence notifications to friends.

nodes.name: handleConnectUser
nodes.summary: Authenticates the WebSocket session, registers the connected user in WsGateSessionRegistry, responds with a success event, and triggers an online-notification push to friends.

nodes.name: pushOnlineNotification
nodes.summary: Queries WsGateChEngineFriendClient for online friend targets and broadcasts a UserOnlineNotificationDTO to each of them via WsGateOutboundWriter.

nodes.name: closeUserWebSocketConnection
nodes.summary: Forcibly closes a user's active WebSocket session by user id, used for administrative or forced disconnects.

nodes.name: WsGateFriendHandler.java
nodes.summary: Handles inbound "add friend" and "respond friend" WebSocket messages, validating payloads, invoking WsGateFriendClient, and pushing results to the affected user's session.

nodes.name: WsGateFriendHandler
nodes.summary: WebSocket message handler implementing the Friend domain's real-time add/respond request flow.

nodes.name: handleAddFriend
nodes.summary: Authenticates the session, validates and converts the payload, sends an AddFriendCommand via WsGateFriendClient, then responds to the sender and pushes the event to the target user if online.

nodes.name: handleRespondFriend
nodes.summary: Authenticates the session, validates the response payload, sends a RespondFriendCommand via WsGateFriendClient, then responds to the sender and notifies the original requester.

nodes.name: WsGateOutboundWriter.java
nodes.summary: Central utility for serializing and safely sending WebSocket responses and broadcasts, including per-session send locking, room broadcasts, and single/multi-user push notifications.

nodes.name: WsGateOutboundWriter
nodes.summary: Shared component handling all outbound WebSocket serialization, per-session locking, and broadcast/push logic for the gateway.

nodes.name: sendSafely
nodes.summary: Sends a serialized payload to a session under a per-session lock, guarding against concurrent writes to the same WebSocket.

nodes.name: createSuccessEvent
nodes.summary: Builds a success WebSocketDTO event with request id, message type, and JSON-serialized payload data.

nodes.name: createFailEvent
nodes.summary: Builds a failure WebSocketDTO event carrying an error message for the given request and message type.

nodes.name: broadcastToRoom
nodes.summary: Serializes a success event once and sends it to every open session currently viewing a room, pruning closed sessions along the way.

nodes.name: broadcastToRoomExceptUser
nodes.summary: Same as broadcastToRoom but excludes a specific user (typically the message sender) from the broadcast.

nodes.name: pushToSingleUser
nodes.summary: Looks up a user's active session via WsGateSessionRegistry and sends them a success event.

nodes.name: pushToMultipleUsers
nodes.summary: Sends a success event to each session belonging to a set of user ids, pruning closed sessions.

nodes.name: WsGateSessionRegistry.java
nodes.summary: In-memory registry tracking connected WebSocket sessions per user and per chat room, supporting connect/disconnect, room enter/exit, and lookup/metrics operations.

nodes.name: WsGateSessionRegistry
nodes.summary: Thread-safe in-memory store mapping WebSocket sessions to users and rooms, used across the dispatcher, handlers, and outbound writer.

nodes.name: exitRoomSession
nodes.summary: Removes a user's session from a room's tracked viewers, cleaning up the room entry entirely once it becomes empty.

nodes.name: removeSessionAllRooms
nodes.summary: Removes a disconnecting session from every room it was viewing, logging and cleaning up any rooms left empty.

nodes.name: getViewingUserIds
nodes.summary: Returns the set of user ids currently viewing a room, pruning any closed sessions first.

nodes.name: getRoomSessions
nodes.summary: Returns the map of user id to WebSocket session for a room, pruning closed sessions before returning.

nodes.name: WsGatePayloadConverter.java
nodes.summary: Utility that converts a generic WebSocketDTO payload into a strongly-typed request DTO class using Jackson.

nodes.name: WsGatePayloadConverter
nodes.summary: Jackson-based helper converting untyped WebSocket payloads into specific request DTO types for handlers.
